description_long: This is a grand marble sculpture depicting a seated, muscular male figure with long, curly hair and a beard, draped in a classical robe. The figure sits on an ornate throne adorned with intricate reliefs and decorative motifs, including lion heads on the armrests and mythological scenes on the sides. His right arm is raised with the index finger pointing upward, while his left hand holds a scepter or staff, signifying authority. The base of the sculpture features an inscription, and the overall craftsmanship is highly detailed, with realistic anatomical features and flowing drapery. The sculpture exudes a sense of power and divinity, reminiscent of ancient Greco-Roman representations of gods such as Zeus or Jupiter. The material appears to be white marble, giving the piece a stately and timeless appearance.
description: A detailed white marble sculpture of a seated, bearded male figure on an ornate throne, with one arm raised and the other holding a scepter. The throne features intricate reliefs and lion motifs, evoking classical Greco-Roman artistry.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the figure's head, the draped robe, and the elaborate decorative backrest of the throne.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the figure's profile, the extended left arm holding a scepter, and the mythological relief on the throne's side.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the figure's face, muscular torso, raised right arm, and the full inscription on the base.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's right arm raised, the detailed drapery, and another mythological relief on the throne's side.
attribute_subject_matter: Seated male deity, likely Zeus or Jupiter, on a decorated throne
attribute_location_context: No visible environmental context; background is isolated and white, suggesting a studio or catalog setting.
